name: bratri-v-triku
description: Staticky web nad rešerší studia Bratři v triku.

scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs');['index.html','styles.css','vercel.json','Bratri_v_triku_research.md'].forEach((file)=>{if(!fs.existsSync(file)){throw new Error('Missing '+file)}});console.log('Static site files present.')"
